testcase.name: baseSetUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'FFE-TEJAS-MOHAN', ip: '127.0.0.1'

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure.
